title: VimFu — Ctrl-U
description: Ctrl-U scrolls half a page up. Smoother than Ctrl-B for reading code — you keep more context on screen.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Control U scrolls half a page up. Smoother than control B because you keep more context on screen.
We're at the bottom. Press control U.
Half a page up. The bottom half of the old screen is still visible at the top.
Another half page. Easy to keep your place.
Near the top now. U for up, D for down. Half page at a time.
Control U. Half page up. The most popular way to scroll in Vim.
